title: Frontend Context Wiring Unlock — X-Company-Id on purchase pages
scope: Path A (narrow): X-Company-Id header on 6 fetch calls across 2 files. Unlocks Task 68B.2 runtime test. Other 17 frontend files deferred to Task 68B.4.

checks.name: new/page.tsx — X-Company-Id in draft POST
checks.what: 1 fetch call to purchases/draft now sends X-Company-Id header

checks.name: [purchaseId]/page.tsx — all 5 fetch calls have X-Company-Id
checks.what: GET, PUT, PUT-before-post, POST /post, POST /copy, POST /cancel — all send header

checks.name: runtime — New Purchase creates DRAFT
checks.what: Click 'New Purchase' in UI → draft created → redirect to /purchases/{id} → no COMPANY_CONTEXT_MISSING
checks.url: echo 'manual: UI → Purchases → New Purchase — expect editor page, not error banner'

checks.name: runtime — Purchase editor loads
checks.what: GET /purchases/{id} loads document — header + items visible
checks.url: echo 'manual: page should render PurchaseHeaderEdit + PurchaseItemsEdit, NOT loading spinner forever'

checks.name: runtime — Save DRAFT works
checks.url: echo 'manual: edit fields → Save button — expect Saved ✓ banner'

checks.name: runtime — POST purchase succeeds (this unlocks 68B.2)
checks.what: Click Post → confirm → status flips to POSTED + snapshot fields populated in DB
checks.url: echo 'manual: Post button → Yes → check DB: SELECT totalNetAmount, totalVatAmount, totalGrossAmount, journalEntryId, postedAt FROM purchase_documents WHERE id=...'

checks.name: invariant — golden snapshot match
checks.what: totalGrossAmount === SUM(journal_lines.debit) for the just-posted purchase
checks.url: echo 'manual: psql SELECT p.totalGrossAmount, (SELECT SUM(jl.debit) FROM journal_lines jl WHERE jl.journalEntryId=p.journalEntryId) FROM purchase_documents p WHERE p.id=...'

not_included: All SelectDialogs (Client, Warehouse, Product, etc.) — Task 68B.4
Migration to apiClient — Task 68B.4 (currently inline header injection only)
ESLint rule 'no naked fetch to /api/company/' — Task 68B.4
